name: Dexlab
author: Léo (Leonardo Ferreira)
description: A modular AI-powered design framework covering the full product design lifecycle — from research to delivery.

plugins.name: design-operation
plugins.description: Streamline operations: critique frameworks, handoff specs, sprint planning, and team workflows.

plugins.name: design-audit
plugins.description: Validate designs: prototyping strategies, usability testing, heuristic evaluation, and A/B experiments.

plugins.name: product-thinking
plugins.description: Define product strategy, frame problems, construct PRDs, and align teams on what actually matters.

plugins.name: ux-research
plugins.description: User research: synthetic personas, empathy maps, journey maps, interviews, usability testing, and JTBD.

plugins.name: ux-writing
plugins.description: Define experience copy and best practices — microcopy, error messages, empty states, and tone guidelines.

plugins.name: interaction-design
plugins.description: Design meaningful interactions: micro-animations, state machines, gestures, error handling, and feedback.

plugins.name: design-systems
plugins.description: Build and maintain design systems: tokens, component specs, naming conventions, and documentation.

plugins.name: ui-design
plugins.description: Craft polished interfaces: color systems, typography, visual hierarchy, responsive design, and wireframing.
